stemHtml: When an aircraft approaches an airport west of a mountain range amid cold and stable air conditions, with clouds forming just below the mountain tops due to a westerly wind, the critical question arises: at what location is the most severe airframe icing anticipated, given that the zero-degree isotherm aligns with the height of the ridge?

options.a: On the east side of the mountains, just above the ridge.
options.b: On the west side of the mountains, about half way up.
options.c: On the west side of the mountains, just above the ridge.
options.d: On the east side of the mountains, about half way up.
